title: BaritoneRemover
description: Removes baritone and other similar boting methods from your server
body:
**Contrary to the name this plugin: tries to remove all boting methods from your server**

Botting software, in this context, refers to any software designed to automate player actions, such as movement and actions, on behalf of users.

All customization options are conveniently managed within the config.yml file.

Commands:
- /br debug = prints some debug values (useful if you encounter issues)
- /br reload = reloads the config

Permissions:
- br.alert = allows you to see all alerts made by the plugin
- br.debug = adds accces to /br debug command
- br.reload = adds accces to /br reload command
- br.bypass = player will not be detected by the plugin

[Discord](https://discord.gg/xG8beHPXUS)

If you like this plugin, you can [DONATE](https://paypal.me/ChromMob)

![Example](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/cqJwlmZJ/images/a636207486a658dc22f7a0aadc03bd07eb5a7248.png)
